title: assertion_result.v1
description: The outcome of evaluating one assertion against one candidate output. Every assertion produces exactly one result; none are silently omitted.

score.description: Normalized score in [0,1]; null when status is error/unevaluable and no score applies.

normalization.description: Ordered record of normalization operations applied (each an evidence-bearing note).

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this result (expected/observed values, source spans, trace refs).

failure_codes.description: Controlled failure taxonomy codes when status is fail/error.
